commands.command: vp create vite:monorepo --no-interactive --verbose --directory synth-tools > create.log 2>&1 # create yarn pnp monorepo from yarn project context

commands: ! rg -n "Format failed|ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND|Could not resolve 'vite-plus'" create.log && echo 'create output clean' # create should not hit the old vite-plus resolution failure
test -f synth-tools/.pnp.cjs && echo '.pnp.cjs created' # yarn pnp install should create loader

commands.command: cd synth-tools && vp fmt --check # fmt should succeed in yarn pnp monorepo

commands: node -e "const fs = require('node:fs'); const pkg = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('synth-tools/package.json', 'utf8')); console.log(JSON.stringify({ name: pkg.name, packageManager: pkg.packageManager, workspaces: pkg.workspaces, scripts: pkg.scripts, devDependencies: pkg.devDependencies, resolutions: pkg.resolutions }, null, 2))" # check yarn workspace package metadata
cat synth-tools/.yarnrc.yml # check yarn config preserved
